scripts.build: rm -rf dist && esbuild src/background.ts src/content.ts --bundle --outdir=dist --target=es2022 && cp src/manifest.json src/about.html dist/
scripts.watch: mkdir -p dist && cp src/manifest.json src/about.html dist/ && esbuild src/background.ts src/content.ts --bundle --outdir=dist --target=es2022 --watch
